mapper.sql: id, user_id, receiver_name, receiver_phone, address_detail, is_default, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM user_address WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY is_default DESC, id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_address (user_id, receiver_name, receiver_phone, address_detail, is_default) VALUES (#{userId}, #{receiverName}, #{receiverPhone}, #{addressDetail}, #{isDefault})
